text: is the VOA Special English Health Report.
zh: [0] 这里是美国之音慢速英语健康报道。

text: The United Nations is seeking to improve electronic communication for health workers in Africa.
zh: [1] 联合国正致力于改善非洲医疗工作者的电子通讯条件。

text: Workers in rural areas would have a better way to get training,
zh: [2] 农村地区的医护人员将能以更好的方式获得培训、

text: information and advice from doctors hundreds or even thousands of kilometers away.
zh: [3] 信息以及来自数百甚至数千公里外医生的建议。

text: In 2005, the World Health Assembly passed a resolution
zh: [4] 2005年,世界卫生大会通过了一项决议,

text: urging countries to plan for e -health services.
zh: [5] 敦促各国规划电子医疗服务。

text: The idea is to look for ways to use modern information and communications technologies
zh: [6] 其构想是寻找利用现代信息和通讯技术的方法,

text: to strengthen health systems.
zh: [7] 以加强医疗体系。

text: The World Health Organization says Africa is behind other parts of the world
zh: [8] 世界卫生组织表示,非洲在

text: in treating HIV -AIDS, tuberculosis and malaria.
zh: [9] 治疗艾滋病、结核病和疟疾方面落后于世界其他地区。

text: So, the United Nations Economic and Social Council
zh: [10] 因此,联合国经济及社会理事会

text: is supporting the expansion of telecommunications technology for healthcare workers.
zh: [11] 正在支持为医疗工作者扩展电信技术。

text: Telemedicine is another term for e -health.
zh: [12] 远程医疗是电子医疗的另一种说法。

text: Stenar Pedersen is the director of the Norwegian Center for Telemedicine
zh: [13] 斯特纳·佩德森是挪威远程医疗中心主任,

text: at the University Hospital of North Norway.
zh: [14] 该中心隶属于北挪威大学医院。

text: Dr. Pedersen is working with the WHO.
zh: [15] 佩德森博士正与世卫组织合作。

text: He recently met with West African health officials in the Ghanaian capital, Accra.
zh: [16] 他最近在加纳首都阿克拉会见了西非各国的卫生官员。

text: He says the technology can provide easier access to medical specialists
zh: [17] 他说,这项技术可以让人们更容易获得专科医生的帮助,

text: and make it easier for people to seek medical information
zh: [18] 也能让人们更方便地

text: themselves. Elias Sori is the Director General of Health Services in Ghana.
zh: [19] 自行寻求医疗信息。埃利亚斯·索里是加纳卫生服务总干事。

text: He says eHealth will offer a way to reduce the effects of health worker shortages
zh: [20] 他说,电子医疗将有助于缓解医疗人员短缺的影响,

text: and and make it easier to train existing workers.
zh: [21] 并使培训现有医护人员变得更容易。

text: Dr. Sori says the technology will also make it easier for doctors
zh: [22] 索里博士说,这项技术还能让加纳主要教学医院的

text: at Ghana's main teaching hospital to share their
zh: [23] 医生们更方便地

text: knowledge. Dr. Sori said this would help doctors in villages with difficult cases.
zh: [24] 分享知识。索里博士说,这将帮助乡村医生处理疑难病例。

text: They would be able to link up easily with a top doctor in the hospital to get advice.
zh: [25] 他们将能够轻松与医院的顶尖医生联系,获得建议。

text: He also said that there is always new medical information,
zh: [26] 他还说,医学信息总在不断更新,

text: but it is not necessary for all doctors to go to the teaching hospital to be trained
zh: [27] 但并非所有医生都需要亲自前往教学医院接受培训

text: and increase their knowledge. He said e -health can bridge that gap,
zh: [28] 来增长知识。他说电子医疗可以弥合这一差距,

text: and medical education is one of the most important parts of eHealth.
zh: [29] 医学教育是电子医疗最重要的组成部分之一。

text: Services must be shaped to fit each country's health care needs
zh: [30] 服务方式必须根据各国的医疗需求

text: and level of technological development. Another issue is patient privacy.
zh: [31] 以及技术发展水平来量身定制。另一个问题是患者隐私。

text: The hope is that health ministries will together develop policies
zh: [32] 人们希望各国卫生部能共同制定政策,

text: on collecting and storing electronic health information about individuals.
zh: [33] 就收集和存储个人电子健康信息作出规范。

text: And that's the VOA Special English Health Report.
zh: [34] 以上就是美国之音慢速英语健康报道。

text: Transcripts, MP3s, and archives of our reports
zh: [35] 我们报道的文字稿、MP3音频和存档

text: can be found at voaspecialenglish .com, where you can also post comments.
zh: [36] 都可以在voaspecialenglish.com网站上找到,您也可以在那里发表评论。
